# Divine Stack Technologies

> Divine Stack Technologies is a web & app development agency based in Uttar Pradesh, India, delivering custom websites, web applications, mobile apps, UI/UX design, SEO, and in-house SaaS tools (lead generation and CRM) for businesses across education, coaching, manufacturing, real estate, food & beverage, and e-commerce.

Divine Stack Technologies builds full custom solutions (not template/page-builder sites) — the client owns the complete source code, and every project includes a real backend, database, and admin panel where relevant. The team is based in Meerut/Noida, Uttar Pradesh, and works with clients across India.

## Services

- [Web Development](https://divinestacktechnologies.com/services): Custom websites and web applications built with React, Next.js, and Node.js — mobile-first, SEO-optimized, and built to convert.
- [Mobile App Development](https://divinestacktechnologies.com/services): Native and cross-platform mobile apps for Android and iOS.
- [UI/UX Design](https://divinestacktechnologies.com/services): Interface and experience design for web and mobile products.
- [SEO, AEO & GEO](https://divinestacktechnologies.com/services): Search engine optimization plus Answer Engine and Generative Engine optimization — helping sites show up in Google, AI Overviews, and AI assistant answers.
- [Cloud & DevOps](https://divinestacktechnologies.com/services): Hosting, deployment, and infrastructure setup.
- [AI & Automation](https://divinestacktechnologies.com/services): Custom AI-powered features and workflow automation.

## Portfolio

- [Portfolio](https://divinestacktechnologies.com/portfolio): Real, live projects delivered for clients — a school website and ERP system, a UPSC/IAS coaching academy site, a metal manufacturing company site, an interior design studio site, a restaurant ordering site, and in-house SaaS tools (Lead Generation Tool, CRM Tool).
